---
title: "\'Life among the Factories\'"
---

## \'Life among the Factories\'

**Author:** Mrs  Laurie
**Date:** 1859-1862
**Imprint:** <i>MP</i> (November 1859-February 1862</i>

### Notes

Five articles under this title appeared in <i>MP</i> between November 1859 and February 1862, probably not all by the same person, since one is unsigned, two are signed \'H.\' and two \'K.L.\'.  CMY refers, however, to \'Mrs Laurie, the lady of Life in the Factories\', to whom the last two at least can presumably be safely attributed.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
